- = Not Assessed/No Information

498 FEEL_BAD_FREQ_ADMSN_CD FEEL_BAD_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Feeling bad about yourself: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with which the patient has been feeling bad about themselves – or that they are a failure or have let themselves or their family down. 0 = Never or 1 day 
1 = 2-6 days 
2 = 7-11 days 
3 = 12-14 days
